subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Husayn, I found no title sweeter, more delightful, or more heart-entrancing than this with which to address thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالحسین عنوانی شیرین تر و خوشتر و دلکشتر از این نیافتم که ترا بان خطاب
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @personal instructions, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
